featureSections.title: Full-Service Handyman for Every Need
featureSections.body: Whether it's fixing a leaky faucet, assembling furniture, or remodeling a kitchen, we handle it all with precision and care. Our team arrives on time, works efficiently, and leaves your space spotless.
bullets: Licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
Same-day service available for urgent repairs
featureSections.cardBody: We use only top-grade materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results.

featureSections.title: Tailored to Your Home & Budget
featureSections.body: No two projects are alike. We listen to your needs, offer expert advice, and create a plan that fits your timeline and budget. From small touch-ups to full renovations, we bring your vision to life.
bullets: Free on-site estimates with detailed proposals
Flexible scheduling to accommodate your lifestyle
Eco-friendly options and sustainable materials available
Post-service follow-up to ensure your satisfaction
featureSections.cardBody: We handle all the details so you can relax and enjoy your improved space.

servicesPage.intro: From small fixes to big transformations, NTX Handyman offers a comprehensive range of services to keep your home or business in top shape. Every job is backed by our commitment to quality, affordability, and customer satisfaction.

services.title: General Repairs & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Fix leaky faucets, squeaky doors, cracked tiles, and more. We handle all those little things that add up.
services.longDescription: Our general repair service covers a wide array of household issues. Whether it's a running toilet, a broken light switch, or a hole in the wall, we diagnose the problem and provide a lasting fix. We use high-quality parts and materials to ensure durability. Regular maintenance packages are also available to keep your home in peak condition year-round.
benefits: Extend the life of your home's fixtures and systems
Prevent minor issues from becoming costly repairs
Enjoy a safer, more comfortable living environment
Save time and hassle with one call for all repairs

process.title: Inspection & Diagnosis
process.description: We thoroughly assess the issue to identify the root cause.

process.title: Repair with Quality Parts
process.description: We use reliable materials and proven techniques to fix the problem.

process.title: Cleanup & Final Check
process.description: We clean the work area and test everything to ensure it's working perfectly.

faqs.question: Do you charge for estimates?
faqs.answer: No, all estimates are free and come with a detailed breakdown of costs.

faqs.question: Can you handle emergency repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day service for urgent issues. Call us anytime.

services.title: Interior & Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Give your walls, trim, and siding a fresh, professional look with our precision painting services.
services.longDescription: Transform any room or the entire exterior of your home with our expert painting services. We prep surfaces meticulously, use premium paints, and apply even coats for a flawless finish. Our team handles color consultation, furniture moving, and post-job cleanup. Whether it's accent walls or full-house painting, we deliver stunning results that last.
benefits: Boost your home's curb appeal and resale value
Protect surfaces from weather and wear
Achieve a smooth, streak-free finish every time
Minimize mess and disruption with our careful process

process.title: Surface Preparation
process.description: We clean, sand, and prime surfaces to ensure optimal paint adhesion.

process.title: Expert Application
process.description: We use brushes, rollers, and sprayers for a consistent, professional coat.

process.title: Final Inspection & Touch-Up
process.description: We inspect every inch and touch up any imperfections.

faqs.question: What type of paint do you use?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality, low-VOC paints from trusted brands like Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore.

faqs.question: How long does a typical room take?
faqs.answer: Most rooms can be completed in 1-2 days, depending on size and condition.

services.title: Carpentry & Woodwork
services.shortDescription: Custom shelves, trim, doors, and furniture assembly. Precision carpentry for your home or office.
services.longDescription: From building custom bookshelves to installing crown molding, our carpentry services add beauty and functionality to any space. We work with a variety of woods and finishes to match your style. Our team also offers furniture assembly, deck repairs, and custom cabinetry. Every cut is measured twice and crafted with care.
benefits: Add architectural interest and value to your property
Get furniture that fits perfectly in your space
Enjoy durable, handcrafted pieces built to last

process.title: Design & Material Selection
process.description: We discuss your vision and recommend the best wood and design.

process.title: Precision Cutting & Assembly
process.description: Our carpenters build each piece with exact measurements and joinery.

process.title: Installation & Finishing
process.description: We install securely and apply stain, paint, or sealant as needed.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim or molding?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can replicate profiles and stain colors to blend seamlessly.

faqs.question: Do you build custom cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we design and build custom cabinets for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.

services.title: Plumbing & Electrical
services.shortDescription: Licensed professionals for faucet repairs, toilet installations, outlet upgrades, and more.
services.longDescription: Our licensed plumbers and electricians handle a wide range of residential and commercial tasks. From fixing a dripping faucet to installing new light fixtures, we ensure work is done safely and up to code. We also offer water heater maintenance, garbage disposal replacement, and electrical panel upgrades. Safety and reliability are our top priorities.
benefits: Peace of mind with licensed, insured technicians
Compliance with local building codes and regulations
Energy-efficient solutions to lower utility bills
Fast, reliable service for urgent plumbing or electrical issues

process.title: Safety Assessment
process.description: We inspect the system and identify any hazards or code violations.

process.title: Professional Repair/Installation
process.description: We perform the work using proper tools and techniques.

process.title: Testing & Verification
process.description: We test all connections and ensure everything operates correctly.

faqs.question: Are your plumbers and electricians licensed?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our technicians are fully licensed and insured for your protection.

faqs.question: Can you handle major electrical rewiring?
faqs.answer: We handle a wide range of electrical work, including rewiring and panel upgrades.

about.headline: Dedicated to Quality, Committed to Dallas
about.mission: To provide exceptional handyman services that improve the comfort, safety, and beauty of our clients' homes and businesses, while building lasting relationships based on trust and integrity.
story: NTX Handyman & Contractors LLC was founded with a simple mission: deliver high-quality home repair and renovation services with honesty and professionalism. What started as a one-man operation has grown into a trusted team of skilled craftsmen serving the Dallas area. Our founder, a lifelong Dallas resident, saw a need for reliable handymen who show up on time, communicate clearly, and take pride in their work.

Over the years, we have completed thousands of projects, from minor fixes to full-scale renovations. Our reputation is built on word-of-mouth referrals and a commitment to exceeding expectations. We treat every home like our own and every client like family. Today, NTX Handyman is a go-to resource for homeowners and businesses who value quality, reliability, and fair pricing.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, use materials we'd use in our own homes, and provide honest recommendations.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work, paying attention to every detail to ensure lasting results.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We respect your time, property, and privacy, leaving your space clean and tidy.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local businesses and give back to the Dallas community that has supported us.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with NTX Handyman
contact.subheadline: Ready to get started? Fill out the form or call us for a free estimate.
